untranslatable_reason: Signal requires three independent conditions: (1) VIX > 70th percentile — approximated using india_vix > 70, but percentile calculation is not available; (2) Extreme breadth (>60% declining) and Put/Call ratio (>1.0) — breadth and options data not in allowed indicators; (3) Account equity solvency check (>110% of max loss) — portfolio-level constraint not expressible in price/indicator rules. Partial translation uses available volatility proxies but cannot fully capture the psychological/structural market conditions intended.
translation_notes: Used hvol_20 (0.70 scale ≈ 70th percentile approximation) and india_vix as volatility hysteria proxies. Single-day 5% move translated to returns > ±5%. Exit conditions inferred: 50% at +1% mapped to partial exit trigger, trailing 3% stop approximated with -10% hard stop. Direction set CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to reflect counter-trend nature. Position sizing and solvency checks cannot be embedded in price-only rules.
